name: Singh Sang Pa
original_name: สิงห์สั่งป่า
overview: Singh used to work for the baddies. After he retired from the group, he returned to his hometown only to find out that his family members were killed. He later joined a thief gang lead by Dao in order to fight the baddies. They both had a bad past with the bad guys lead by a man who is actually his brother-in-law.

trailers.title: สิงห์สั่งป่า : หลุยส์ เฮส-พิ้งค์พลอย ปภาวดี วางแผนปล้นอาวุธ
